Partnerships.heroSubtitle: Connecting di BFA market with di big big institutions for African trade—from government people to big banks.
Partnerships.tradeIntelligenceSubtitle: Important info on all di continental blocks and financial systems driving African market level.
Partnerships.ctaSubtitle: Are you an institution or service provider supporting African market? Join our network to provide trusted services to thousands of sellers and buyers.
Partnerships.ministriesDesc: Government blocks handling and supporting international trade inside African countries.
Partnerships.chambersDesc: Private sector bodies pushing business growth and cross-border networking.
Partnerships.banksDesc: Specialized money partners giving trade finance, credit, and investment backup.
Partnerships.paymentDesc: Digital ground-work for safe cross-border money transactions and currency sorting.
Partnerships.microfinanceDesc: Supporting small market traders and artisans with easy financial services.
Partnerships.afcftaDesc: Di biggest free trade area inside di world by number of countries, planning to link 54 inside 55 African Union states into one market of 1.4 billion people.
Partnerships.papssDesc: Dis financial step dey critical to reduce depending on foreign money like US dollar by making instant cross-border payments inside local money.
Partnerships.ecowasTitle: Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS)
Partnerships.ecowasDesc: Dis bloc get free trade area since 1990. For January 2025, Mali, Burkina Faso, and Niger pull out officially, though free movement for pipo still dey expected.
Partnerships.eacDesc: EAC don reach Customs Union and set up common market for goods, with trade among members paying no duty and united under one customs land.
Partnerships.sadcDesc: Di SADC Free Trade Area start for 2008 and get 16 member states, though right now 13 dey actively practice di free trade area rules for regional growth.
Partnerships.comesaTitle: Common Market for Eastern and Southern Africa (COMESA)
Partnerships.comesaDesc: Standing for a market of over 500 million people, COMESA start customs union for 2009 to help regional joining and economic growth.

Resources.logisticsTrackingDesc: See your international shipments live as dem dey comot big African ports.
Resources.complianceSubtitle: Tax and custom money dey different well-well based on where goods come from and the agreement wey dey ground.

Resources.ctaSubtitle: Our trade compliance partners dey ready to help you navigate cross-border business without stress.

About.heroDescription: Connecting African business pipo to world markets, pumping up economic growth, and showing how African products better reach.
About.missionSubtitle: Whether you be African business wey dey try expand enter world or buyer wey dey find original African products, show your face for our growing community today.

connect.title: Connect
connect.description: Joining African sellers wit buyers everywhere, making one digital market wey cross any border matter.

empower.title: Empower
empower.description: Giving African businesses di tools, shine, and market access wey dem need to blow and succeed globally.

sustain.title: Sustain
sustain.description: Pushing for sustainable business logic, fair trade, and clean production across all African supply chain.

storyParagraphs: Buy from Africa start for 2023 with vision to change how di whole world dey discover and access African products. Our founder, Sarah Johnson, spend over 10 years working across different African countries, seeing correct quality and plenty products wey dey struggle to reach international market.

Wetin start as small platform with just 20 sellers don grow enter Africa leading marketplace connecting thousands of verified businesses with buyers worldwide. We don help sellers boost exactly how much money dem dey make from export by average of 40% while making sure dem goods reach market wey dem no fit touch before.
Today, we dey function for 15 African countries with big big plans to spread across di whole continent, continuing our mission to showcase African hustle and craftsmanship to di world.
About.teamDescription: Led by experts wey get strong root for Africa, our different team don bring together experience in technology, international trade, and supply chain management.

sarah.bio: Sarah start Buy from Africa after running 10 years working for international development across different African countries. She get MBA from Harvard Business School and she too passonate about economic empowerment through trade.

daniel.bio: Daniel lead our technology team with over 15 years proper experience building massive platforms. Before before e dey Amazon and Microsoft, e return come im native Nigeria to help fix technology wey empower African businesses.

amina.bio: With plenty experience for logistics and supply chain management across West Africa, Amina dey make sure say our platform operate without stress and sellers fit deliver wetin dem promise.

About.countriesDescription: We dey actively join sellers and buyers across these African countries, with better plans to reach out throughout di continent.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.subtitle: Abeg read these terms carefully before you use our platform. As you dey access and use Buy from Africa, e mean say you don accept this agreement.

introduction.title: 1. Quick Intro
introduction.content: Welcome to Buy from Africa. These Terms of Service ("Terms") go control how you access and use our website, services, and applications (all combined, the "Service"). As you access or use the Service, e mean say you agree to follow these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you no gree with any part of these terms, you no fit access the Service.

account.title: 2. Account Registration & Your Duty
account.content: To access some features of the Service, you must register for an account. You agree to give correct, current, and complete information during registration and keep your account details updated. You dey totally responsible for keeping your account details secret and for everything wey happen inside your account.

vendors.title: 3. Vendor Terms & Conditions
vendors.content: Sellers on Buy from Africa must be legally registered bodies wey get the right to sell their listed products across international borders. Sellers agree to provide correct product descriptions, honour their stated prices, and fulfill orders in good time. We get the right to check your business details, hold payouts for disputed transactions, or suspend your account if you break quality standards.

buyers.title: 4. Buyer Terms & Conditions
buyers.content: Buyers gree to use the platform for correct trade purposes only. You agree to pay all charges wey you or any users of your account make, using the prices wey dey valid when those charges happen. You must follow all import laws, taxes, and customs duties for your receiving country.

fees.title: 5. Fees, Payments, & Subscriptions
fees.content: Buy from Africa dey charge service fees for successful transactions wey happen through the platform. We explain the fee structures correctly on our Pricing page, and we fit update dem sometimes but we go tell you before. We process all payments through our secure third-party payment providers.

content.title: 6. User Content & IP
content.content: You keep all your ownership rights for the content you put on the platform. By putting content (including product pictures, reviews, and messages), you give us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, display, and share that content to provide and promote the Service.

dispute.title: 7. Dispute Settling & Refunds
dispute.content: If kasala burst between a buyer and a seller, both sides should first try to settle the issue peacefully using our messaging system. If e no solve, our mediation team go enter the matter. Refund policies depend on individual sellers but must follow our minimum protection standards.

termination.title: 8. Account Closing
termination.content: We fit close or suspend your account and block access to the Service immediately, without telling you before or paying liability, based on our sole decision, for any reason at all and without limit, including but not just limited to breaking the Terms.

limitation.title: 9. Limit of Blame
limitation.content: Under no condition shall Buy from Africa, or its directors, workers, partners, agents, suppliers, or affiliates, carry the blame for any indirect, accidental, special, consequential or punishing damages, including without limit, loss of profit, data, use, goodwill, or other unseeable losses, coming from your access to or use of or failure to access or use the Service.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: Your matter dey important to us. This Privacy Policy explain how Buy from Africa dey collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our platform.

introduction.title: 1. Quick Intro
introduction.content: Welcome to the Buy from Africa Privacy Policy. We respect your matter and we dey committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy go tell you how we dey look after your personal data when you visit our website (no matter where you visit am from) and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protect you.

dataWeCollect.title: 2. The Data Weey We Collect About You
dataWeCollect.content: Personal data, or personal information, mean any information about person wey dem fit use identify that person. We fit collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you, including Identity Data (first name, last name, username), Contact Data (billing address, delivery address, email address, telephone numbers), Financial Data (bank account and payment card details), and Transaction Data (details about payments to and from you and other details of products and services you don buy from us).

howWeCollect.title: 3. How Dem Dey Collect Your Personal Data?
howWeCollect.content: We dey use different methods collect data from and about you including through: Direct interactions. You fit give us your Identity, Contact and Financial Data by filling forms or by dropping message with us by post, phone, email or otherwise. Automated technologies or interactions. As you dey interact with our website, we go automatically collect Technical Data about your equipment, browsing actions and patterns.

howWeUse.title: 4. How We Dey Use Your Personal Data
howWeUse.content: We go only use your personal data when the law gree make we use am. Most times, we go use your personal data in these situations: Where we need to perform the contract we wan enter or don enter with you. Where e important for our legitimate interests (or those of a third party) and your interests and fundamental rights no bypass those interests. Where we need to follow legal obligation.

dataSecurity.title: 5. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We don put correct security measures to prevent your personal data from getting lost accidentally, used or accessed in an unauthorised way, changed or exposed. Also, we reduce access to your personal data to only those employees, agents, contractors and other third parties wey get business need to know. Dem go only process your personal data on our instructions and dem dey subject to a duty of confidentiality.

dataRetention.title: 6. Data Keeping
dataRetention.content: We go only keep your personal data for as long as we really need am to fulfil wetin we collect am for, including for satisfying any legal, regulatory, tax, accounting or reporting requirements. We fit keep your personal data for a longer time if complain dey or if we really believe say matter fit enter court relating to our relationship with you.

yourRights.title: 7. Your Legal Rights
yourRights.content: Under some conditions, you get rights under data protection laws relating to your personal data. This include the right to: Request access to your personal data. Request correction of your personal data. Request removal of your personal data. Object to processing of your personal data. Request restriction of processing your personal data. Request transfer of your personal data. Right to withdraw consent.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies
cookies.content: You fit set your browser to reject all or some browser cookies, or to alert you when websites set or access cookies. If you disable or reject cookies, abeg note say some parts of this website fit stop working or no function well. For more information about the cookies we dey use, abeg check our Cookie Policy.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.content: If you get any question about this privacy policy or our privacy practices, abeg contact us at privacy@buyfromafrica.com.

FAQ.title: Questions Dem Dey Ask Steady
FAQ.subtitle: Find answers to everyday questions about buying and selling on Buy from Africa. If you no see wetin you dey look for, feel free to contact our support team.

whatIsBfa.question: Wetin be Buy from Africa?
whatIsBfa.answer: Buy from Africa be beta B2B and B2C e-commerce platform wey dey dedicated to joining African manufacturers, artisans, and businesses with buyers around the globe. We dey make sure say secure trade, logistics, and dispute settlement happen so that trading across borders go be without stress.

howToRegister.question: How I fit open account?
howToRegister.answer: You fit register by clicking the 'Register' button for the top right corner of the website. You go need to choose whether you dey register as Buyer or Seller, and give the necessary business or personal information.

buyerFees.question: Any money to pay to be buyer?
buyerFees.answer: Opening buyer account no get price at all. Na only the products you buy you go pay for, plus any shipping and customs money wey dem go carefully show you as you dey checkout.

vendorRequirements.question: Wetin I go bring before I be seller?
vendorRequirements.answer: To be seller, you must get registered business for African country, pass our checking process, and agree to our quality standard and delivery rules. We go ask for proof of business registration and ID.

shippingMethods.question: Which way dem dey send market?
shippingMethods.answer: We dey partner with big big global logistics providers (like DHL, FedEx, and UPS) and certified local African couriers. The shipping options and money you go pay go depend on the place you dey go, the weight, and size of your market.

disputeResolution.question: How una dey settle fight between buyer and seller?
disputeResolution.answer: We get special mediation team wey dey enter the matter if buyer and seller no fit settle among demself. We go hold money put for one side until buyer conform say the market don reach and no spoil, bringing protection for the two side.
